Sunnybank.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - flash flood warnings, minor impact from Stable Swamp Creek overflow
Sunnybank.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 暴洪警报，Stable Swamp Creek 溢流造成轻微影响
Sunnybank.notes: Located within Stable Swamp Creek catchment. Most of suburb on moderate elevation. Low-lying areas near creeks at risk of overland flow.
Sunnybank.notes_cn: 位于 Stable Swamp Creek 流域内。大部分区域地势适中。靠近溪流的低洼区域有地表径流风险。整体洪水风险较低，适合居住。

Eight Mile Plains.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - minor localised flooding, largely unaffected due to elevated terrain (avg 49m)
Eight Mile Plains.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 轻微局部积水，因地势较高（平均海拔49米）基本未受影响
Eight Mile Plains.notes: One of Brisbane's more elevated southern suburbs. Contains headwaters of Bulimba Creek. Low-lying pockets near creek corridors have some risk.
Eight Mile Plains.notes_cn: 布里斯班南区地势较高的郊区之一。包含 Bulimba Creek 上游源头。仅溪流走廊附近的低洼区域有一定风险。购房时避开溪边低洼地段即可。

Calamvale.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - localised creek and overland flow flooding in low-lying areas
Calamvale.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 低洼区域出现局部溪流和地表径流积水
Calamvale.notes: Within Stable Swamp Creek and Oxley Creek catchments. Overland flow most frequent flood type. BCC Stable Swamp Creek Flood Study provides detailed modelling.
Calamvale.notes_cn: 位于 Stable Swamp Creek 和 Oxley Creek 流域内。地表径流是最常见的洪水类型。布里斯班市政府已完成详细洪水建模研究。建议购房前查阅洪水覆盖图。

Rochedale.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - some localised creek flooding, not significantly impacted
Rochedale.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 少量局部溪流积水，未受显著影响
Rochedale.notes: Elevated terrain with new development incorporating modern stormwater management. Parts in Bulimba Creek and Slacks Creek catchments.
Rochedale.notes_cn: 地势较高，新开发区域采用现代雨水管理系统。部分区域位于 Bulimba Creek 和 Slacks Creek 流域。新建住宅洪水风险极低。

Mansfield.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - creek flooding from Bulimba Creek and tributaries
Mansfield.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Bulimba Creek 及支流溪流洪水泛滥
Mansfield.notes: Bulimba Creek (122 sq km catchment) flows through suburb. Flood overlay updated Sept 2023 per Bulimba Creek flood study. Urbanisation increased impervious surfaces.
Mansfield.notes_cn: Bulimba Creek（122平方公里流域）穿越该区。2023年9月已更新洪水覆盖图。城市化增加了不透水面积，加剧了径流。购房前务必检查具体地块是否在洪水覆盖区内，可能影响保险费用。

Ascot.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - Brisbane River peak 3.85m AHD, Breakfast Creek flooding. Also impacted in 2011 (4.46m peak)
Ascot.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 布里斯班河峰值3.85米，Breakfast Creek 洪水泛滥。2011年洪灾同样受灾严重（峰值4.46米）
Ascot.notes: Adjacent to Brisbane River and Breakfast Creek. Low-lying areas near Eagle Farm racecourse historically inundated. Flood insurance premiums can exceed $10,000/year in high-risk zones.
Ascot.notes_cn: 紧邻布里斯班河和 Breakfast Creek。赛马场附近低洼区域历史上多次被淹。高风险区域洪水保险费可能超过每年$10,000。购房时强烈建议查阅洪水地图，选择高地段物业。

Hamilton.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - Brisbane River flooding, riverside areas and Northshore precinct impacted. Also severely affected in 2011, 1974, and 1893
Hamilton.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 布里斯班河洪水，河滨区域和 Northshore 地区受影响。1893年、1974年和2011年洪灾均严重受灾
Hamilton.notes: Kingsford Smith Drive divides hilly residential (lower risk) from flat former-wharf areas (high risk). Northshore Hamilton PDA has extensive flood management infrastructure. Over 1,000 homes in Breakfast Creek area submerged historically.
Hamilton.notes_cn: Kingsford Smith Drive 将山丘住宅区（低风险）与平坦的前码头区域（高风险）分隔。Northshore Hamilton 优先开发区已建设完善的防洪基础设施。Breakfast Creek 区域历史上超过1,000栋房屋被淹。选择山丘一侧的物业风险更低。

Runcorn.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - minor localised flooding near Bulimba Creek tributaries
Runcorn.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Bulimba Creek 支流附近轻微局部积水
Runcorn.notes: Within Bulimba Creek catchment. Mostly elevated residential areas with low flood risk. Some low-lying pockets near creek corridors.
Runcorn.notes_cn: 位于 Bulimba Creek 流域内。大部分住宅区地势较高，洪水风险低。仅溪流走廊附近低洼区域有轻微风险。整体适合居住。

Wishart.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - minimal impact, elevated terrain provided natural protection
Wishart.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 影响极小，地势较高提供天然保护
Wishart.notes: Located within Bulimba Creek upper catchment. Generally elevated terrain with good drainage. Very low flood risk for most properties.
Wishart.notes_cn: 位于 Bulimba Creek 上游流域。地势普遍较高，排水良好。绝大多数物业洪水风险极低。

Upper Mount Gravatt.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - largely unaffected due to elevated terrain around Mount Gravatt
Upper Mount Gravatt.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 因 Mount Gravatt 周围地势较高基本未受影响
Upper Mount Gravatt.notes: Elevated terrain surrounding Mount Gravatt provides excellent natural drainage. One of the lowest flood risk suburbs in southern Brisbane.
Upper Mount Gravatt.notes_cn: Mount Gravatt 周围的高地势提供优良的自然排水。是布里斯班南区洪水风险最低的郊区之一。购房时无需过多担心洪水问题。

Macgregor.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - localised flooding near Stable Swamp Creek corridor
Macgregor.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Stable Swamp Creek 走廊附近局部积水
Macgregor.notes: Within Stable Swamp Creek catchment. Most residential areas are on moderate elevation. Low-lying areas near creek have some overland flow risk.
Macgregor.notes_cn: 位于 Stable Swamp Creek 流域内。大部分住宅区地势适中。溪流附近低洼区域有一定地表径流风险。购房时避开溪边低洼地段。

Robertson.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - minor creek flooding near Stable Swamp Creek
Robertson.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Stable Swamp Creek 附近轻微溪流积水
Robertson.notes: Located within Stable Swamp Creek catchment. Generally low flood risk with good stormwater management. Some overland flow risk in low-lying pockets.
Robertson.notes_cn: 位于 Stable Swamp Creek 流域内。整体洪水风险较低，雨水管理完善。仅低洼区域有一定地表径流风险。

Stretton.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - some localised flooding near Oxley Creek tributaries
Stretton.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Oxley Creek 支流附近部分局部积水
Stretton.notes: Within Oxley Creek catchment. Newer development with modern stormwater infrastructure. Some areas near creek tributaries have moderate overland flow risk.
Stretton.notes_cn: 位于 Oxley Creek 流域内。较新的开发区配备现代雨水基础设施。溪流支流附近部分区域有一定地表径流风险。整体风险可控。

Kuraby.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - creek flooding from Bulimba Creek affected low-lying areas
Kuraby.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Bulimba Creek 溪流洪水影响低洼区域
Kuraby.notes: Bulimba Creek flows through the suburb. Properties near creek corridors have moderate flood risk. Elevated areas away from creek are low risk.
Kuraby.notes_cn: Bulimba Creek 穿越该区。溪流走廊附近的物业有中等洪水风险。远离溪流的高地区域风险较低。购房前建议查阅洪水覆盖图。

Coopers Plains.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - flooding from Stable Swamp Creek and Oxley Creek tributaries
Coopers Plains.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Stable Swamp Creek 和 Oxley Creek 支流引发洪水
Coopers Plains.notes: Within Stable Swamp Creek and Oxley Creek catchments. Industrial areas and low-lying residential pockets have higher flood risk. BCC flood overlay should be checked.
Coopers Plains.notes_cn: 位于 Stable Swamp Creek 和 Oxley Creek 流域内。工业区和低洼住宅区洪水风险较高。购房前务必查阅布里斯班市政府洪水覆盖图。

Algester.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - localised flooding near Oxley Creek tributaries
Algester.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - Oxley Creek 支流附近局部积水
Algester.notes: Within Oxley Creek catchment. Mostly elevated residential terrain with low flood risk. Some overland flow risk near creek tributaries.
Algester.notes_cn: 位于 Oxley Creek 流域内。大部分住宅地势较高，洪水风险低。溪流支流附近有一定地表径流风险。整体适合居住。

Parkinson.last_major_flood: Feb 2022 - minimal impact, well-drained newer development areas
Parkinson.last_major_flood_cn: 2022年2月 - 影响极小，较新开发区域排水良好
Parkinson.notes: Within Oxley Creek catchment. Relatively new suburb with modern stormwater infrastructure. Low flood risk for most properties.
Parkinson.notes_cn: 位于 Oxley Creek 流域内。较新的郊区，配备现代雨水基础设施。绝大多数物业洪水风险低。
